description_long: This is a large outdoor stage structure featuring a peaked white canopy supported by four metal poles at each corner. The stage platform is elevated and covered with alternating dark brown and white stripes, giving it a visually striking appearance. At the front, two rectangular podiums or speaker stands are positioned symmetrically on either side of the entrance. The rear of the stage is enclosed with a geometric-patterned panel in black and white, providing a backdrop for performances. The canopy is topped with a small triangular flag, adding a decorative touch. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for events, performances, or public gatherings in urban parks or plazas.
description: A modern outdoor stage with a peaked white canopy, striped platform, and geometric rear panel, flanked by podiums at the entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance, striped stage floor, and two podiums on either side.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the stage, the striped flooring, and one podium visible at the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the geometric-patterned black and white panel that encloses the back of the stage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the striped floor and podium, highlighting the canopy's structure and side paneling.
